docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO OCT-27-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY POLISH INTERPRETER---BOLESLAW SIKORSKI. PLAINTIFF ARRIVED LATE IN THE COURTROOM AT 10:35AM BY THEN COURT WAS OVER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JAN-15-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. MEDIATED DISPOSITION. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY POLISH INTERPRETER---BOLESAW SIKORSKI. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 50.00 - SERVED AUG-24-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MNICH, WALDEMAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY SAWICKI, BOGDAN AS TO DEFENDANT MNICH, WALDEMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BASED ON PROGRESS REPORT OF 10/27/14. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
